title: Dharma Chakkaram
subTitle: Chakkaravarthy loses a challenge with Arumugam, which leads to his girlfriend sacrificing her life. Years later, Chakkaravarthy meets another woman who shares her name with his former lover.

title: Hit List
subTitle: A curated collection of famous songs written and performed by renowned musicians as well as artists, is played in rapid succession.

title: Oorukku Uzhaippavan
subTitle: Secret agent Selvam is indebted to Raja's family. When Raja tries to help his friend Radha, he ends up being involved in a murder and Selvam decides to investigate the case.

title: Suprabhatam
subTitle: Devotees chant the 'Suprabhatam', a devotional verse part of Hinduism, invoking the Almighty and offering their heartfelt prayers.

title: Kandhashastikavasam
subTitle: A comprehensive compilation of religious hymns and devotional songs in praise of Lord Murugan written by various artists.

title: Arul Neram
subTitle: Devout priests in various temples conduct sacred rituals and prayers to praise and worship various deities in the Hindu faith.

title: Kaalai Malar
subTitle: The host interviews various prominent personalities from different fields and discusses in detail their works and future plans.

title: Thenkinnam
subTitle: The host presents a comprehensive compilation of old Tamil film songs composed and performed by various talented artists and singers.

title: Kasi
subTitle: Having endured years of blindness and the hardships that accompanied it, a visually impaired musician is tricked into believing that a physician can restore his sight.

title: Arusuvai Neram
subTitle: A prominent chef demonstrates his culinary skills by preparing a variety of delicious vegetarian recipes and provides tips and suggestions.

title: Chinna Durai
subTitle: Chinnadurai, a village do-gooder, helps people in distress but earns the enmity of a fellow villager Ponnambalam. Later, Ponnambalam tries to poison Chinnadurai, but he survives.

title: Enna Samayalo
subTitle: Renowned chefs introduce recipes for delicious dishes, sharing the ingredients while demonstrating the method of preparation.

title: Gamma Gamma Malai
subTitle: An eminent culinary expert shares various recipes and demonstrates the process of cooking it step by step, along with providing valuable tips.

title: News
subTitle: The host provides the latest information, advancements, and developments regarding various political, economic and social issues.

title: Krishna Cottage
subTitle: A group of youngsters who are neighbours soon become the best of friends as they get to know each other better. While they get into hilarious situations, they also face life one day at a time.

title: Jeyyam
subTitle: Bringing the best in television.

title: Kai Rasi Kudumbam
subTitle: A joint family based in Kanchipuram faces several challenges and hurdles every day, but tries to overcome them with each other's help and support.

title: Ketti Melam
subTitle: bringing the best in television.

title: Idhayam Thotta Kadhaigal
subTitle: Bringing the best in television.

subTitle: Five close friends from various backgrounds face various challenges as they work towards their goals, stand up for each other and make the most of their lives.
